## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Docs Impact

- [ ] No docs impact
- [ ] README updated
- [ ] Other docs updated

If docs are not needed, explain why:

## Change Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore

## What Changed

- [ ] Core app behavior changed (screens/services/navigation)
- [ ] Database logic/schema changed
- [ ] Setup or environment variables changed
- [ ] Public API/contracts changed

## Checklist

- [ ] I tested the change locally
- [ ] I updated README/documentation when behavior/setup/schema changed
- [ ] I considered backwards compatibility
- [ ] I added/updated logging or errors where useful

## Testing Notes

List the steps you ran and expected outcomes.
